disposition.reason: Governed registry and serving stack have no draft prediction role or incumbent smoke serving path for Mode B /predict. Force-registering would invent a training champion win and violate champion_* + complete-set gates.
disposition.unblock_path: Measured P5 promotion creating verified champion_bodypart (+ hand/clothing as required by sequential residency) then create_production_runtime auto-configures predictor; then re-prove RUNTIME_PASS_BOUNDED predict+refine with promotion_eligible=false

draft_authority_clarification.meaning_of_draft_in_mode_b: Draft refers to response authority floor (status draft_model_generated; promotion_eligible=false), NOT permission to serve non-champion/challenger checkpoints on /predict

investigation_question: Can a governed draft-only challenger/incumbent be registered as a temporary Mode B predict provider without inventing a training champion win?

live_reprobe.predict_exact_blocker: champion prediction provider is not configured (HTTP 503); champions=0; configured_models=[]

policy_gates.rule: configure_champion_predictor raises ServingError unless every role startswith champion_

static_probe.error: serving predictor may load champion_* roles only

static_probe_challenger_role.error: serving predictor may load champion_* roles only

live_probe.detail: champion prediction provider is not configured

policy_gates.rule: InferenceRuntime.predict refuses when predictor is None with exact message champion prediction provider is not configured
create_production_runtime configures sequential champions only when required champion roles are a subset of present champions; otherwise predictor stays None (health/models still serve)
register_training_candidate refuses champion_* and any role other than challenger_bodypart

static_probe.error: completed body-part runs register only as challenger_bodypart
static_probe.note: Role gate fires after key validation when key is valid; champion_* refused before any file copy

policy_gates.rule: promote_model_role / promote_custom_segmenter_role require verified matrix/smoke evidence; inventing a champion pointer without measured win is forbidden

verdict: NO — policy forbids. Do not force-register.
